component.name: Lantern
component.summary: Author Markdown slide decks with live preview

description.p: Lantern is a small GUI for making Marp slide decks on GNOME. Edit on the left. See the slide render on the right. Present from the same window.
It runs on Marp, so your Marp Markdown works as is. Themes, directives, backgrounds, fragments. Lantern handles the editor, the live preview, present mode, and export.
A deck saves as one .lantern file. The slides, images, and fonts stay together. Rename it to .zip if you want to look inside.

ul.li: Editor and live preview side by side, or focus on one
Present full screen, or in a plain window for screen sharing
Export to PDF, PowerPoint, or HTML
One portable .lantern file holds the whole deck
Drop in images and fonts. Lantern writes the reference for you
Saves as you type. Follows the system light and dark setting

description.p: A big release. Decks now save as one file. Drop images and fonts straight in. Export and present from the same window.

ul.li: Save a whole deck as one .lantern file. Slides, images, and fonts together.
New Resources window. Drop in images and fonts. Insert them with a click.
Export to PDF and PowerPoint. No bundled browser.
Runs on Intel, AMD, and ARM machines.

description.p: First cut: editor, preview, autosave, light/dark, layout toggle.
